original_statement: is the race held on august 5th longer or shorter than the race held on september 16 in terms of laps.
mutated_statement: is the event done on a certain day longer or shorter than the event done on another day in terms of something.
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Temporal detail deletion] + [Attribute generalization] + [Verb generalization]: "race" → "event" (specific entity→generic) | "august 5th" → "a certain day" (specific date→vague) | "september 16" → "another day" (specific date→vague) | "in terms of laps" → "in terms of something" (specific metric→unspecified) | "held" → "done" (more generic verb)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从日志中可识别的关键信息：tree_and_critic 的 critique 指出第2步做了不被支持的假设（用赛名词数定义“longer”），iteration 1 after_refine 的 simple_query 明确返回并解释“cannot be determined”，并且 judge_thought 多次指出表中缺少距离/圈数等关键度量。Agent 的具体表现是先在 iteration 0 根据不相关字段（赛名词数）给出猜测性答案，随后在 critique 指出错误后修正为明确声明“无法确定”，并解释缺少必要信息。因为 agent 最终识别并明确说明问题不明确且无法在现有数据下回答（而非继续给出确定答案），符合“意识到目标模糊，反问用户/要求澄清”的定义。
